perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman sits at a wooden table covered with McDonald's burger boxes, fries, and drinks. Behind her, a person stands wearing a red jumpsuit and a black mask with a white circle, holding a gold-colored metal pot over her head. A tablet on the left displays a sound frequency meter. (2) The woman eats a burger, then suddenly widens her eyes and covers her mouth with her hands. The masked figure swings the pot, hitting her on the head. (3) Close-up shots show the interior of a burger with two beef patties and a breaded squid patty. (4) The woman continues to eat various items, including fries and another burger, frequently looking at the tablet and giving thumbs-up gestures. (5) She turns around and pulls the mask off the figure behind her, revealing a young man who then begins eating the food with her. (6) The video ends with her holding up a wrapped burger toward the camera and pointing at it.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The sound begins with crisp chewing and swallowing noises. This is interrupted by a sharp, high-pitched female scream, immediately followed by a loud, resonant metallic 'clang' as a pot hits a surface. (2) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music with a strong rhythmic beat begins. (3) Sounds of rustling paper bags and the crunching of fried food are layered over the music. (4) A female voice speaks rapidly in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone, occasionally dropping to a whisper. (5) The video concludes with the same upbeat music and a final enthusiastic vocal sign-off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "超過50dB就要被打" (If it exceeds 50dB, you will be hit) - Functional hook text describing the challenge rules. (2) "(被自己叫聲嚇到)" (Scared by her own scream) - Decorative caption adding humor. (3) "這是韓系新品 韓味雙牛魷魚堡" (This is a new Korean-style product: Korean Double Beef Squid Burger) - Functional text identifying the product. (4) "真的好吃!" (Really delicious!) - Decorative emotional text. (5) "從8月27號到10月7號" (From August 27 to October 7) - Functional text stating the promotion period. (6) "限量、售完為止" (Limited quantity, while supplies last) - Functional disclaimer text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Challenge Intro -> Reaction/Scream -> Product Demo/Eating Montage -> Promo Details

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator eating, 1 male dressed as a soldier behind her.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white and green long-sleeved shirt with red cherry hair clips.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a plain light-colored wall, a wooden table, and a tablet displaying technical graphs.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a creative advertisement for McDonald's limited-time Korean-style burgers. It uses a 'Squid Game' parody (the noise challenge) to grab attention, showcases the product's ingredients through close-ups and ASMR eating sounds, and provides specific promotional dates to encourage immediate purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of McDonald's packaging, detailed close-ups of specific menu items, and vocal/textual mention of promotional dates and product names.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Noise challenge with sound meter, Squid Game soldier costume, high-energy editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends popular culture trends (Squid Game) with the Mukbang genre to create a high-engagement promotional piece.
